title: PVP Stuff N' Additions
description: It is a alround starter pvp pack for everyone.
body:
## Starter PvP Resource Pack

This PvP resource pack is made especially for beginners who want a clean look and better visibility in fights. It keeps the default Minecraft style but improves important PvP elements to help you focus and play better.

Features:

🔥 Low Fire – better vision while fighting

⚔️ Small Swords & Shield – less screen blocking, more control

🧭 Improved HUD – clearer hearts, hunger, and hotbar

🎯 Clean and simple textures for smooth PvP

🚀 Beginner-friendly and easy to get used to

⚡ Optimized for better performance

💥 No Explotion particle for smother crystals

💫 Small Totem - Small Totem pop animation

🔧 Mod Support for Appleskin

Perfect for players who are new to PvP and want a simple, competitive advantage without changing the game too much.
